name: space_law_biometric_enrollment_backlog_harbor_st_lt
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Space Law, the situation tagged internally around space law biometric enrollment backlog harbor st lt has converged with local pressure in the Cedar Point corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as short term against long term; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Ansel Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Ansel Alvarez, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Space Law. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mei Berg
agents.identity: I am Mei Berg, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Space Law. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so long term does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so short term does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Ansel Alvarez must choose under short term versus long term. What does Ansel Alvarez do?
